---
title: "BLANK: Full Name of Data Source"
author:
  - name: Seungju Kim
    orcid: 0009-0009-5166-9170
    email: seungju7@illinois.edu
    affiliation: 
      - name: University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign
        department: Psychology
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  eval: false
  echo: true
---

## Source Description

**Full name:** BLANK  
**Website:** [BLANK](https://BLANK)  
**Data type:** BLANK (e.g., Administrative/policy tracking, Survey, Experimental)  
**Unit of analysis:** BLANK (e.g., State-year, Individual)  
**Coverage:** BLANK (e.g., 50 U.S. states + D.C., 2010–present)  

### About the Original Data

BLANK: What is this dataset and who collects it? What construct is it 
measuring? Why is it relevant as a structural stigma indicator?

### Original Data Collection

| Feature | Details |
|---------|---------|
| Collection method | BLANK (e.g., Policy tracking, Online survey, Phone survey) |
| Sampling frame | BLANK (e.g., All U.S. states, U.S. adult internet users) |
| Sample type | BLANK (e.g., Census, Probability, Convenience) |
| Update frequency | BLANK (e.g., Annual, Continuous) |
| Geographic coverage | BLANK (e.g., State-level, National) |
| Temporal coverage | BLANK–present |

::: {.callout-note}
BLANK: Note any important caveats about how the original investigators 
collected or coded this data.
:::

### Required Citation

If you use this indicator in published research, you must cite the 
original data source in addition to the stigmaR package:

> BLANK: Full citation for original data source here.

---

## Access and Download

| Feature | Details |
|---------|---------|
| Access type | BLANK (e.g., Public download, Registration required, Request) |
| URL | [BLANK](https://BLANK) |
| Authentication required | BLANK (Yes/No) |
| Cost | BLANK (Free/Paid) |
| Last accessed | BLANK (Month Year) |

### Download Procedure

BLANK: Step-by-step description of how the data was obtained. Be specific 
enough that someone could reproduce this in 5 years if the website changes.
```r
# BLANK: Download code here
```

::: {.callout-warning}
BLANK: Note any known instability in access (e.g., website changes, 
file format shifts across years). Delete this block if not applicable.
:::

---

## Cleaning Procedure

### Raw Data Structure

- **File format:** BLANK (e.g., `.csv`, `.xlsx`, `.sav`)  
- **Rows:** BLANK (e.g., One row per state-year, One row per respondent)  
- **Key variables used:** BLANK  

### Cleaning Steps

#### 1. BLANK (e.g., Variable Selection)

BLANK: What variables were retained and why. What was excluded and why.
```r
# BLANK
```

#### 2. BLANK (e.g., Exclusion Criteria)

BLANK: What cases/rows were excluded and why.
```r
# BLANK
```

#### 3. BLANK (e.g., Recoding / Scoring)

BLANK: Any recoding, reverse scoring, or composite construction.
```r
# BLANK
```

::: {.callout-important}
BLANK: Document any judgment calls here — these are the decisions 
future you (or a reviewer) will ask about. Delete if not applicable.
:::

---

## Aggregation to State Level

::: {.callout-note}
This section documents how individual-level or sub-state data was 
aggregated to the state level. Skip if data is already state-level.
:::

### Unit of Analysis in Raw Data

BLANK: What is the original unit of observation? 
(e.g., Individual respondent, County, Zip code)

### Aggregation Method

| Feature | Decision | Rationale |
|---------|----------|-----------|
| Statistic | BLANK (Mean/Median/Sum) | BLANK |
| Weighting | BLANK (Unweighted/Survey-weighted) | BLANK |
| Missing states | BLANK (Excluded/Imputed) | BLANK |
```r
# BLANK: Aggregation code here
```

### Sensitivity Checks

BLANK: Note any alternative aggregation approaches considered and 
why the chosen approach was preferred. Delete if not applicable.

---

## Output Dataset

### Variables in Final Output

| Variable | Type | Description | Range |
|----------|------|-------------|-------|
| `state` | chr | Two-letter state abbreviation | — |
| `year` | int | Calendar year | BLANK–BLANK |
| `BLANK` | BLANK | BLANK | BLANK |
| `BLANK` | BLANK | BLANK | BLANK |

### Output File
```r
saveRDS(BLANK, here("data", "clean", "BLANK", "BLANK.rds"))
```

**File location:** `data/clean/BLANK/BLANK.rds`  
**Rows:** BLANK  
**Last generated:** BLANK (Month Year)  

---

## Known Limitations

- BLANK
- BLANK

---

## References

BLANK: Full references for any papers, reports, or technical documentation 
from the original data collectors.
